name: Summerset Group Holdings Limited 4.78% GTD SNR BDS 11/07/2023 NZD5000
summary: SUM010.NZ represents a debt security issued by Summerset Group Holdings Limited, a retirement village operator in New Zealand; it is a guaranteed senior bond with a fixed interest rate of 4.78% and is due to mature on 11/07/2023; the bond has a face value of NZD5000.
